data.content:
Plan review approval, 2026-04-25

Reviewed the approval visibility plan against acceptance criteria and invariants. The plan correctly treats this as visibility, not auto-approval; covers live terminal and persisted history rendering; includes the Codex Playwright mcpServer/elicitation/request fixture from f354; and requires adapter coverage or explicit unsupported-shape documentation for Claude, Codex, OpenCode, Copilot, and Gemini. The proposed shared helper is acceptable because it preserves equal treatment across adapters and keeps the high-visibility marker consistent. Approved for implementation.
